report.summary: Cycle-close: 2 new learn guides shipped (Solana Liquid Staking + Corporate Crypto Treasury) with interactive LST calculator. Published slugs now 513 (unique 494). Git locks Day 10 — 791 uncommitted files, deploy gap ~170+ pages. 46 TS errors unchanged. All 6 API routes healthy.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 2 new pages built this cycle: /learn/solana-liquid-staking-guide-2026 and /learn/corporate-crypto-treasury-guide-2026 — both page.tsx files confirmed present
New interactive component: SolanaLSTCalculator.tsx — client component with 5-LST yield comparison table
Corporate treasury page fix applied: removed 'use client' directive conflicting with metadata export, fixed import path
Published slugs in file: 513 entries (494 unique after deduplication). 5 ecosystem pages also added this cycle (Pendle, RocketPool, MakerDAO, Yearn, Ondo)
Page audit: 103 published slugs missing page.tsx files (up from 56 in previous report — recount with deduplication reveals true gap includes Day 1 pillar learn/tax/wallet pages never scaffolded)

TypeScript: 46 errors across 3 files — UNCHANGED (crypto-arbitrage-strategies-guide-2026, crypto-index-funds-guide-2026, structured-data.examples.ts) — all are JSX escaping issues (> not escaped as >)
No new regressions introduced this cycle
PUBLISH_QUEUE remains at 0 items — all queued content promoted

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API routes present and structurally healthy: /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields

Cache TTLs verified: prices (60s/swr:120s), trending (300s/swr:600s), fear-greed (600s/swr:1200s), market-metrics (60s/swr:120s), market-dominance (300s/swr:600s), defi-yields (dynamic CACHE_DURATION)
All routes have stale-while-revalidate headers and fallback data for API failures
Rate limiter: 0/6 core API routes using checkRateLimit — rate-limiter.ts exists but not wired (carry-over P1)
CoinGecko free tier (no API key) — rate limit risk on traffic spikes remains unmitigated
No production logs accessible — code review only

sections.title: DevOps
items: Git lock files persist: .git/HEAD.lock (Mar 16 11:17) + .git/index.lock (Mar 16 13:06) — DAY 10 of blocker
791 uncommitted files (up from 786 in previous EOD — 5 new files from this build cycle)
Last deployed commit: e999560 (Mar 17) — deploy gap now ~170+ pages
All new content since Mar 17 is LOCAL-ONLY — not reachable in production
next.config.ts has ignoreBuildErrors: true for TS — Vercel builds will succeed despite 46 TS errors
CRITICAL: Jefe must manually run: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock && git add -A && git commit && git push
No vercel.json present — deployment uses default Vercel Next.js settings

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: 2 learn guides (Solana Liquid Staking 2026 + Corporate Crypto Treasury 2026), 1 interactive component (SolanaLSTCalculator), 5 ecosystem pages promoted
PUBLISH_QUEUE: Remains at 0 (drained earlier today). Content pipeline needs refill for next cycle.
TODAY'S TOTAL REPORTS: standup×2, build×2, community×2, design×2, publish×2, eod×2 = 12 reports
CARRY-OVER [P0]: Git locks Day 10 — 791 files, ~170+ page deploy gap. Jefe action required.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 103 published slugs missing page.tsx (Day 1 pillars: 18 wallets, 8 taxes, 19 investing/best, 19 learn fundamentals, /compare/exchanges)
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 46 TS errors across 3 files — JSX escaping issues (trivial fix but not prioritized)
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter coverage 0/6 core API routes
CARRY-OVER [P2]: Duplicate slugs in published-pages.ts (513 entries but only 494 unique)
NEXT CYCLE: Refill PUBLISH_QUEUE, scaffold missing Day 1 pillar pages, Tax-Loss Harvesting tool (April 15 deadline — 21 days away)
